ideation: This animation sequence portrays a woman in a tuxedo, conveying confidence and sophistication. The animation will emphasize poise and controlled movements, reflecting the formal attire. The arms will maintain a mostly neutral posture to avoid distracting from the overall image of elegance. Frame 1 starts with both arms down, subtly emphasizing the formal attire. Frame 2 shows a slight lift of the hands, almost as if adjusting a cufflink or preparing for a gesture. Frame 3 returns the arms to the original position. Frame 4 shows hands gently resting on the hips, emphasizing poise, then returning to the neutral position in Frame 5.

frames.beat: arms hang formally at the sides
hands lift slightly, a subtle adjustment
arms return to a poised, neutral stance
hands rest briefly on hips, elegant poise
arms settle back into formal stillness
